phases.title: Phase 6 — Reward → bandit reweighting
phases.meta: Reward shape live · Reweighting cron pending

topGaps.title: Reward → bandit posterior update cron
topGaps.detail: Reward shape lives in code, but the scheduled job that flushes reward into Thompson posteriors is not yet running on prod.

topGaps.title: Drift alerts pipeline
topGaps.detail: Drift is computed; alert fanout to Slack/PagerDuty stub-only.

topGaps.title: Canary promotion automation
topGaps.detail: 5 ramps documented; no orchestrator yet — promotions are manual.

topGaps.title: Auto-rollback on KPI breach
topGaps.detail: Need KPI watchers + revert hook; depends on canary orchestrator.

topGaps.title: Governance registry
topGaps.detail: Owner / on-call / change-control roles defined in doc only — no system of record.

topGaps.title: Portfolio ROAS rollup
topGaps.detail: Per-brand attribution lands; cross-brand portfolio rollup not started.

topGaps.title: Convergence loop
topGaps.detail: Indistinguishability eval gate spec exists; double-blind harness not built.

topGaps.title: Compounder eval gate
topGaps.detail: Weekly compounder run wired; the eval gate that decides promote-vs-hold not yet enforced.

topGaps.title: Capability ledger UX
topGaps.detail: 27-capability tracker exists as a spreadsheet; needs a first-class page in the dashboard.

topGaps.title: RFC + change-log enforcement
topGaps.detail: No CI hook validating RFC presence on `dna_*` schema changes.
